creator: i@levsha.me
text:
On this patch PORTVERSION is 0.9.3 (not 0.9.3.1, as on my patch).
So, RELVER can be removed completely: we can use %%PORTVERSION%%
directly in pkg-plist.
All other looks good.

Please do not forget to 
cvs add patch-liquidsoap-x.x.x__Makefile \
patch-liquidsoap-x.x.x__Makefile.defs.in \
patch-liquidsoap-x.x.x__doc__Makefile \
patch-liquidsoap-x.x.x__examples__Makefile \
patch-ocaml-ao-x.x.x_src_ao__stubs.c

Thanks!

-- 
LEFT-(UANIC|RIPE)
